title: cerastium tetrandrum var. alsinoides
intro: Cerastium tetrandrum var. alsinoides, also known as Alsine or Mountain Pink, is a perennial plant species belonging to the carnation family (Caryophyllaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Cerastium tetrandrum var. alsinoides include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various health conditions. Herbal preparations of Cerastium tetrandrum var. alsinoides include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
